IUCN Categories

points
dark theme
IUCN status categories for all species that have one.
Author

D. de Vienne

Published

November 25, 2025

Show the code 
import polars as pl
from pylifemap import Lifemap

# Load iucn dataset
iucn = pl.read_parquet(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Lifemap-ToL/pylifemap/main/data/iucn.parquet"
)

Lifemap(iucn, taxid_col="taxid", width="100%").layer_points(fill="status").show()
Warning: 778 taxids have not been found in Lifemap database.
Warning: 152 duplicated taxids have been found in the data.
